name: LUX Brass
description: This recipe introduces a distinct warmth to mid-tones and highlights, while shadows take on a noticeable magenta cast. It gives images a bit of character without feeling overly stylized, leaning toward a somewhat vintage digital aesthetic rather than a film emulation. If you want to lean further into the strenghts of the look, try shifting the white balance slightly warmer (something like A1.50, M0.25 seems to work well in most scenarios).
author: Mihai Serban
